name: XMAX V3 PRO Glass Bubbler
summary: Enhance your product lineup with the XMax V3 Pro Glass Bubbler —a premium water filtration accessory designed for the XMax V3 Pro Vaporiser.
description: Enhance your product lineup with the XMax V3 Pro Glass Bubbler —a premium water filtration accessory designed for the XMax V3 Pro Vaporiser. This glass attachment replaces the standard mouthpiece to deliver smoother, cooler, and more refined vapour. Featuring an integrated water chamber, this bubbler helps cool vapour and reduce harshness. The result is a significantly smoother draw, making it a popular upgrade for customers seeking improved comfort and performance. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
